title: Continuous aggregate semantics
description: Continuous aggregates incrementally materialize rollups over a refresh window; data outside the refreshed range is not yet reflected.
body: Use when relying on downsampled views for dashboards or retention. A continuous aggregate stores precomputed buckets and refreshes incrementally over a configured window; very recent or very old data may not be materialized until the next refresh. Do not assume the aggregate is instantly consistent with raw inserts. Actions: configure the refresh window to cover both recent lag and expected lateness, and read recent data from raw if real-time accuracy is needed. Validation signals include aggregate buckets matching raw counts after refresh. Risk boundary: enabling raw retention before the aggregate covers the window loses history permanently.
